meta.title: BOServices - Retail store operations
meta.description: Business Operations Services. We run retail stores on behalf of brands who want to grow without compromise. Trust, structure, flow, performance.

hero.title: We grow together.
hero.lede: We run retail stores for brands that have ambition and want to focus on the product. Hiring, shifts, finance, KPIs - all under one roof.

duvera.title: Trust
duvera.body: We only work where we can treat the brand as if it were our own.

struktura.title: Structure
struktura.body: Processes, roles, reporting. Predictable operations that don't rest on one person.

tok.title: Flow
tok.body: Shifts flow, stock flows, cash flows. From chaos to rhythm.

vykon.title: Performance
vykon.body: We measure what matters. Revenue, margin, NPS, churn - no vanity metrics.

what.title: We run retail stores for brands.
what.lede: When a brand has a great product but daily store operations consume the team, we take it over. From hiring and shifts to finance and reporting.

ops.title: Store operations
ops.body: Hours, shifts, standards, audits. A consistent customer experience across locations.

people.title: People & HR
people.body: Hiring, onboarding, reviews, payroll. A team that stays and grows.

finance.title: Finance & reporting
finance.body: Cash, revenue, margin, monthly close. A report you understand in five minutes.

growth.title: Growth & expansion
growth.body: We open new stores, evaluate locations, run remodels.

people.title: Three directors. One responsibility.
people.lede: Based in Prague, on Uhelný trh. Part of the CEIP group.
people.groupNote: Shareholder: CEIP Business Finance Solutions s.r.o.

contact.title: Got a brand that deserves better operations?
contact.lede: Write a few sentences - how many stores you run, where you are based, and what's bugging you most. We reply within two business days.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: We run 12 stores, looking for a partner to...
form.successBody: We'll get back to you at your email within two business days.
form.errorBody: Please try again or email us directly at hello@boservices.cz.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.message: Please write at least one sentence.
